channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pot hole in road, 17th June
item.description:
Outside 74-76 Park Avenue, Longlevens, Gloucester, GL2 0EQ. What 3 Words: Soups.Songbird.Shoulders

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Giant hogweed- may touch cyclists and will cause permanent skin damage, 17th June
item.description:
Across the road from the houses
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: The bus stop is no longer in use and should be removed. People still stand tgere wauting for tge 97/98 bus, 17th June
item.description:
Outside 123 Warden Hill Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncut grass, 17th June
item.description:
Thank you for cutting some of the grass on the Abbotswood Road estate in Brockworth. I reported yesterday that grass in some places is very long. Please see photos of the area that has still not been cut outside the back of 19 Castle Hill Drive (on Lasne Crescent) yet the area of grass just up the road and in full view has been cut. The alleyway down the side of 19 Castle Hill Drive is also getting very overgrown (see photo) as are all the alleys on the estate. Please could you ensure that the missed area of long grass (and others on the estate) are cut as for some reason they get missed every time. This is why they are now thigh height or even waist high in some places. Regards Jillian Bell Resident of Castle Hill Drive Brockworth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 17th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 17th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 17th June
item.description:
Permanent repair Road/Lane closure 28 day please lift and relay x1 sunken rocking gully frame and rattling lid cover approx 600x450x60mm stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 17th June
item.description:
Customer asking for details of when the bollard will be reinstated by Highways as people are parking here.

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 17th June
item.description:
Customer reports that unauthorised advertising boards have been attached to Highways signs on the roundabout (black and white chevrons). Other signs in the area have been reported to Tewkesbury Borough Council, which may be passed to Highways in due course.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)
